home.title: Custom AI integration, GDPR-compliant.
home.subtitle: I help SMEs and startups integrate LLMs, RAG and agents into their tools, without sending their data outside Europe.

trustItems.title: GDPR-compliant by design
trustItems.body: EU hosting, anonymisation, data-flow audit. Your data stays where it belongs.

trustItems.title: Up-to-date AI stack
trustItems.body: Frontier & open-source LLMs, RAG, fine-tuning, agents. I stay actively informed.

trustItems.title: Pragmatic delivery

about.metaDescription: 4th year engineering student at UTT and AI integration freelancer, Pierre Kasparian.
about.heading: About
about.introBody: I'm Pierre Kasparian, a 4th year computer engineering student at UTT (Université de Technologie de Troyes) and an AI integration freelancer. I design and deploy custom AI solutions for SMEs and startups, with one obsession: keeping your data in Europe and under your control.

parcourItems.title: UTT - Computer Engineering
parcourItems.body: 4th year. Generalist engineering programme, specialising in information systems and software development.

parcourItems.title: LLM Engineering - 8 weeks
parcourItems.body: Intensive programme with Ed Donner: RAG, QLoRA fine-tuning, autonomous agents, 20+ frontier and open-source models. Flagship project: Python-to-C++ optimiser with 60,000× speedups.

parcourItems.title: Machine Learning & Data Science
parcourItems.body: ML fundamentals: regression, classification, clustering, scikit-learn, Python. Applied to stock price prediction.

valuesItems.title: GDPR by design
valuesItems.body: Every integration is built for compliance from day one, not bolted on at the end of the project.

valuesItems.title: Knowledge transfer
valuesItems.body: I hand over the skills. At the end of an engagement, you should be able to maintain and evolve what we built.

valuesItems.title: Pragmatism
valuesItems.body: Fast POC, short feedback loop, iterative delivery. No over-engineering.
